_comment: OpenSSF Best Practices self-assessment for RandomCodeSpace/vigil. Project page: https://www.bestpractices.dev/en/projects/12648. RAN-55 — board pre-registered the project; flipping `badge_level` from `in_progress` to `passing` is admin-UI work on bestpractices.dev and is board-owned (matches the codeiq RAN-46 / RAN-52 pattern).
name: vigil
description: Personal task command center for Windows. Single-file PowerShell + WPF (Fluent / Mica) desktop app with Outlook sync, system tray icon, and DPAPI-wrapped local storage. Single-user, MIT-licensed, no compiled binary distribution.

evidence.build_reproducible: No build step — distribution is `git clone` + `pwsh -NoProfile -File ./VIGIL.ps1`. Test harness is `pwsh -NoProfile -File ./Test-Vigil.ps1`.
evidence.ci_workflow: .github/workflows/security.yml (OSS-CLI stack: Semgrep / OSV-Scanner / Trivy / Gitleaks / jscpd / Syft SBOM)
evidence.code_scanning: Semgrep SAST in security.yml; GitHub repo-level CodeQL default setup (`actions` language) for the GitHub Actions YAML — board-owned toggle in repo Settings → Code security → Code scanning. PowerShell language is not supported by CodeQL default setup.
evidence.dependency_updates: .github/dependabot.yml (github-actions ecosystem only — Vigil ships no language lockfile, no Maven / npm / pip surface)
evidence.signed_commits: Branch protection on `main` requires signed commits. Board-owned toggle in repo Settings → Branches.
evidence.secret_scanning: GitHub repo-level secret scanning + push protection. Board-owned toggle in repo Settings → Code security. Cross-checked weekly by Gitleaks in .github/workflows/security.yml.
evidence.vulnerability_scanning: OSV-Scanner + Trivy filesystem scan in .github/workflows/security.yml; Dependabot security updates (board-owned repo toggle) for GitHub Actions ecosystem.

audit.passing_blocker: Final flip from `in_progress` to `passing` happens in the bestpractices.dev admin UI; tracked under RAN-55 acceptance criteria. The board-owned repo toggles (signed-commit branch protection, secret scanning + push protection, Dependabot security updates) need to be enabled before flip.

scorecard_target.policy: observational only — does not gate merge per board ruling
